response.original_title: Is it possible to get unbanned from C o i n b a s e? Secure Your Access
response.overview: Yes, ☎️ +1-(864)-336-8850 it is possible to regain access to a C o i n b a s e account, depending on the reason it was restricted. To secure your access and appeal the decision, follow these steps:  Determine the Cause ☎️ +1-(864)-336-8850 Log in to your account via the C o i n b a s e Dashboard to view on-screen alerts or check your registered email for an explanation of the restriction. Follow the Automated Recovery Steps ☎️ +1-(864)-336-8850 If your account was temporarily locked or flagged for verification, you can often unlock it yourself. Sign in and attempt the restricted action. • Complete the two-factor authentication (2FA) prompt or Dial ☎️ +1-(864)-336-8850. • Upload a valid photo ID (e.g., driver's license or passport) and take a live selfie. • Wait for the verification process, which usually takes 24 to 72 hours.
